title: Speaking - Part 4
description: The examiner will ask you some questions related to the topic from Part 3. Give your opinions and discuss with your partner.

content.task: Discussion on media literacy and freedom of the press.

questions.question: Do you think freedom of the press is genuinely protected in most countries today, and what threats does it face?
How has the rise of social media and citizen journalism changed the way we consume and trust news?

script.text: Do you think freedom of the press is genuinely protected in most countries today, and what threats does it face?
How has the rise of social media and citizen journalism changed the way we consume and trust news?
Thank you. That's the end of the speaking test.
